# Flatow Furniture

> Custom furniture and built-ins handcrafted in San Francisco by David Flatow.

Flatow Furniture is a one-person custom furniture studio in Bernal Heights, San Francisco. David Flatow designs and builds one-of-a-kind wood furniture pieces — dining tables, cabinets, shelving, desks, benches, and built-ins — tailored to each client's space, needs, and taste.

## Pages

- [Home](https://flatowfurniture.com/): Portfolio gallery featuring custom oak dining tables, walnut cabinets, mahogany benches, and madrone desks. Client reviews and contact information.
- [About](https://flatowfurniture.com/about/): David Flatow's background and philosophy on custom furniture making.
- [Design Process](https://flatowfurniture.com/design/): Six-step custom furniture design process from consultation to delivery.
- [Journal](https://flatowfurniture.com/journal/): Articles on furniture making and craftsmanship.
- [FAQ](https://flatowfurniture.com/faq/): 29 frequently asked questions covering pricing, materials, timelines, delivery, and care.
- [Contact](https://flatowfurniture.com/contact/): Studio location and email for project inquiries.

## Details

- Location: 1501 Cortland Ave, San Francisco, CA 94110
- Email: inquire@flatow.furniture
- Areas served: San Francisco, Berkeley, Oakland, San Jose, Marin County
- Specialties: Custom dining tables, cabinets, built-in shelving, desks, benches, armoires
- Materials: Walnut, white oak, cherry, maple, madrone, and other hardwoods
- Price range: $$$$
- Rating: 5.0 stars (Google Reviews)
